snippet.description:
Quotes and sayings for you to share with your friends and family.

A quote or saying can be a great way to get your point across. They can be inspirational, motivating, or just an uplifting piece of wisdom that people need to hear. There are so many quotes and sayings to choose from, but which one is right for you? Some of the best ways to think about a quote or saying is to consider who you are trying to reach. For example, if your business is selling children's clothes, you might want to use quotes by famous authors and artists like Dr. Seuss or Pablo Picasso instead. On the other hand, if your business sells antique furniture, one quote might be appropriate

biography;  George Washington was an American military officer, statesman, and Founding Father who served as the 1st president of the United States from 1789 to 1797. George Washington has been called the "Father of the Nation" for his manifold leadership in the formative days of the country.

snippet.title: George Washington Quotes that are Really Worth Listening | Life Changing Motivational Quotes Forever
snippet.description:
In this video you watch about - George Washington Quotes that are Really Worth Listening To | Life Changing Quotes | Motivational Quotes | Quotes Forever

#georgewashingtonquotes #georgewashington 
#quotes #quotesforever #lifechangingquotes  #inspirationalquotes  #famousquotes  #americanquotes  #quotesofgreatpersons  #quotesaboutlifelessons  #motivationalquotes  

George Washington (February 22, 1732[b] – December 14, 1799) was an American military officer, statesman, and Founding Father who served as the 1st president of the United States from 1789 to 1797. Appointed by the Continental Congress as commander of the Continental Army, Washington led the Patriot forces to victory in the American Revolutionary War and served as the president of the Constitutional Convention of 1787, which created the Constitution of the United States and the American federal government. Washington has been called the "Father of the Nation" for his manifold leadership in the formative days of the country.

George Washington Quotes - Famous Quotes Worth Listening To!
snippet.description:
Geroge Washington Famous Life Quotes. From being an American Military Officer to becoming the first president of the United States, he was one of the most influential people in American History. Listening to his famous quotes about life will make you think about many things in life. Life quotes from Albert Einstein are definitely worth your time.

George Washington was an American military officer, statesman, and Founding Father who served as the first president of the United States from 1789 to 1797. Appointed by the Continental Congress as commander of the Continental Army, Washington led the Patriot forces to victory in the American Revolutionary War and served as the president of the Constitutional Convention of 1787, which created the Constitution of the United States and the American federal government. Washington has been called the "Father of the Nation" for his manifold leadership in the formative days of the country.

"99% of failures come from people who make excuses." - George Washington.

localized.title: FIAT 500 SYMPTOMS OF BAD THROTTLE BODY, FIAT 500 ABARTH THROTTLE BODY
localized.description:
FIAT 500 SYMPTOMS OF BAD THROTTLE BODY, FIAT 500 ABARTH THROTTLE BODY

If you have Fiat 500 or Fiat 500 Abarth and you want to know the symptoms of bad throttle body on Fiat 500 because your Fiat 500 has code that relate to throttle body or throttle position sensor or your Fiat 500 we will explain that in this video. We demonstrated the symptoms of bad throttle body on 2015 Fiat 500 Abarth but it should work on multiple years Fiat 500 even with different engines.
2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016 2017 2018 2019 2020 2021 Fiat 500 Abarth Symptoms Of Bad Throttle Body

snippet.title: Jeep Wrangler Hand Throttle Control #jeepwrangleryj #poweraddictscrew #jeepyj #throttlecontroller
snippet.description:
Jeep Wrangler hand throttles can be used for different things. In my case, it's controlling the amount of air my Onboard Air Compressor puts out. But, they can also be used to control the voltage of a DIY onboard welder or controlling RPMs if your feet are busy with brake/clutch action. In this video, I show you how to install a hand throttle.

Here is the throttle control used in the video: https://amzn.to/3agmdaS
